Prerequisite: CPSG200.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science & Global Change (CPSG) program.

CPSN - College Park Scholars- International Studies

CPSN100 College Park Scholars: International Studies First-Year Colloquium | (1 Credit)

Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to international studies.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars International Studies (CPSN) program.
